picks.quote: I think Sukqin could get the better of him just because you know the size and strength.
I think people need to remember that he got hit to the body bad by Shawn Ali... Shawn Ali could knock him out.
Ilia Taporia out struck Vulcganowski. He out struck him so much that he finished him by brutal knockout.
Pereira is one of the most green fighters in the UFC in terms of wrestling and grappling. And he was able to defend the takedowns against Ankolive.
